title: E2E R2: Research — Python concurrency comparison
body:
Compare three Python concurrency approaches: threading, multiprocessing, and asyncio. For EACH approach, write a separate analysis document:

1. threading-analysis.md — when to use, GIL impact, use cases, code patterns
2. multiprocessing-analysis.md — when to use, IPC overhead, use cases, code patterns
3. asyncio-analysis.md — when to use, event loop model, use cases, code patterns

Then write a comparison summary:
4. concurrency-comparison.md — side-by-side comparison table, decision flowchart (when to pick each), performance trade-offs

Each document should be 40-80 lines. All files in the working directory.

cycle.prompt: Research this specific topic. Gather key facts, patterns, and code examples. Structure as raw notes by sub-topic. Do NOT write a polished document.
Write the final document from the gathered notes. Clean, concise markdown. Save to disk using the Write tool with the exact filename from the subtask description.
